key_takeaways: Discuss highest productivity accelerators in your data pipeline (cuDF / cuML / cuGraph / Spark).
Scaling considerations across NVIDIA platforms (small to largest)
Feedback about roadmap and upcoming features

title: Accelerate Enterprise AI Adoption: Secure Your Agentic Foundations from Day 1 (Presented by CrowdStrike)
abstract:
Enterprise AI adoption is accelerating through AI agents embedded in applications and workflows. While these agents drive innovation, they present unique security challenges as organizations move to production. Traditional security approaches weren't built for agent architectures, creating vulnerabilities in agent logic, prompts, model interactions, and infrastructure.

Learn how CrowdStrike is collaborating with NVIDIA to drive secure enterprise AI adoption across the entire AI life cycle, from governing agent behavior to protecting models, and delivering built-in protection for AI factories. By integrating security into agent design and runtime, organizations can confidently scale AI systems while managing risk.
topic: Trustworthy AI / Cybersecurity - Security for AI
key_takeaways: See how to extend protection to agents built with NVIDIA NeMo Agent Toolkit, from agent creation and orchestration to runtime behavior and inference.
Learn ways to secure agent prompts, tools, and model interactions with inference-time controls and guardrails to reduce prompt injection, data leakage, and agent misuse.
Discover how to scale secure, agentic workloads on the NVIDIA Enterprise AI Factory validated design, with integrated protection across agents, models, data access, and runtime infrastructure.

title: Hard-Won Lessons From Production Inference at Scale (Presented by Together AI)
abstract: Inference is where AI systems face real-world constraints: latency users can feel, costs that scale with every request, and reliability requirements that leave no room for failure. In this session, hear lessons in delivering and continuously optimizing inference in production on Together AI, the AI-native cloud-powering Cursor's Composer 2.0 background coding magenta at massive scale. Drawing on Together's research-driven inference platform and Cursor's experience operating AI products under real developer traffic, the discussion explores how foundational systems work translates into real-world improvements in speed, cost, and reliability-serving trillions of tokens per day across multi-data center deployments and running production inference on NVIDIA HGX B200 and NVIDIA GB200 NVL72, even under unpredictable demand.
topic: Agentic AI / Generative AI - Code / Software Generation
key_takeaways: Latency under real workloads: reducing time-to-first token and latency so background agents feel responsive under concurrent load
Throughput and unit economics: optimizing cost-per-token as demand scales
Production-grade optimization: quantization and hardware-aware execution that preserve model quality while delivering real performance gains
Operating inference systems overtime: monitoring, iteration, and rapid deploy-test loops to keep production stable as models and traffic evolve

title: AI‐RAN in Action: GPU‐Accelerated Performance Gains From the NVIDIA-Nokia Partnership (Presented by Nokia)
abstract: Get a look at how NVIDIA's co-innovation with Nokia marks a deep integration of GPUs in the radio access network (RAN), bringing high-performance computing to the edge and accelerating the path to 6G leadership. This session will discuss the latest performance benchmarks and new uses cases for AI-RAN.
key_takeaways: Gain insight into the latest advancements in Nokia's AI‐RAN platform, powered by NVIDIA ARC-Pro.
Understand latest performance benchmarks for AI-for-RAN.
Discover emerging use cases for AI-on-RAN.
Explore AI-and-RAN opportunities, including potential to run additional AI workloads alongside RAN functions.

title: Red Hat & NVIDIA: Driving Mainstream Enterprise AI Solutions to Unlock Wide-Scale Adoption of AI (Presented by Red Hat)
abstract: Delivering a mainstream enterprise AI solution requires an ecosystem that not only works, but is engineered as a cohesive set of components that fit seamlessly to drive success. To truly provide a seamless enterprise solution, you start in the open, where the components can be visualized, vetted, and cleanly integrated. Red Hat and NVIDIA have taken those steps to begin Day 0 support for Red Hat Enterprise Linux and Red Hat OpenShift on NVIDIA systems, starting with Vera Rubin. In this talk, we will look at the work being done behind the scenes to deliver what is a fundamental change in how open moves faster to deliver an enterprise experience.
key_takeaways: The Power of "Day 0" Ecosystem Integration
"Starting in the Open" for Seamless Security and Reliability
A Fundamental Shift in Speed-to-Market
Red Hat and NVIDIA, Better Together

speakers.name: Scott Herold
speakers.title: Director, Product Management - Red Hat Enterprise Linux

title: Prioritize Accelerated Compute: Maximize Impact in a Supply-Constrained World (Presented by PwC)
abstract:
In today's economy, accelerated computing is the engine behind AI, industrial optimization, and next-generation digital platforms. Yet demand for advanced chips continues to outpace supply, forcing enterprises to make sharper decisions about where their computing resources create the greatest impact. 

In this forward-looking conversation, sector leaders from industrial products, energy, and technology will explore how organizations can prioritize their accelerated computing resources across competing use cases. Rather than relying on static forecasts, the discussion will introduce a practical framework for aligning GPU deployment with business value, operational resilience, and broader societal needs. The goal is not simply to manage existing resources, but to ensure that compute capacity is directed toward the most transformative and economically meaningful applications. 

Designed to be timely and actionable, this session will help you move from reactive allocation to strategic prioritization in an environment defined by rapid technological change.
key_takeaways: How to evaluate and prioritize GPU-intensive workloads based on business impact and return
A practical framework for allocating accelerated compute across AI, industrial, and enterprise use cases
The role of policy, power constraints, and platform evolution in shaping compute strategy
How to treat computing resource allocation as a strategic filter-not just an operational challenge

title: From Foundation Models to SLMs: Powering Vertical AI Factories on NVIDIA (Presented by Tech Mahindra, Ltd.)
abstract:
Enterprises and governments are rethinking how they deploy large foundation models alongside smaller, domain-specific language models to achieve accuracy, security, and cost efficiency at scale. While foundation models provide broad intelligence, domain-tuned small language models (SLMs) are increasingly critical for embedding AI into vertical, regulated, and low-latency operational workflows. 

In this session, we explore how Tech Mahindra is leveraging NVIDIA-accelerated platforms to support the evolution from foundation models to production-grade AI factories-systems that continuously train, fine-tune, deploy, and operate both LLMs and SLMs. Drawing on real-world experience, including telecom-specific language models delivering measurable operational outcomes-such as AI-led handling of over 50% of network operations tickets across autonomous and human-approved workflows-and India's Indus AI mission focused on education at national scale, we show how sovereign AI, private AI, and edge AI can be integrated to deliver secure, scalable, and vertical-ready AI solutions, leveraging NVIDIA technologies such as NVIDIA AI Enterprise, RAPIDS, and NeMo-based data tooling.
topic: Agentic AI / Generative AI - Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
nvidia_technology: CUDA, NVIDIA NIM, NVIDIA AI Enterprise
key_takeaways: Why SLMs are essential complements to foundation models for enterprise and public-sector AI adoption
How sovereign AI, private AI, and edge AI converge in real-world deployments
Lessons learned from building telecom-specific language models and national-scale initiatives such as Indus AI

speakers.name: Nikhil Malhotra
speakers.title: CIO and Global Head of AI and Emerging Tech Business

title: The AI Cloud Behind the Breakthroughs: How Core42 Accelerates MBZUAI Research (Presented by Core42)
abstract: Discover how a sovereign, multi‐accelerator AI cloud is enabling Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence (MBZUAI) researchers to train frontier‐level models faster, more securely, and at larger scale, removing compute bottlenecks and unlocking new breakthroughs in language, climate, and scientific AI. This session explores how purpose-built infrastructure can accelerate research velocity and empower institutions to compete at a global level.
key_takeaways: Learn how sovereign, purpose‐built AI infrastructure removes compute bottlenecks so researchers can train large models faster and more reliably.
See how a multi‐accelerator environment (NVIDIA) enables teams to match every workload with the optimal architecture.
Understand how unified orchestration and low‐latency design accelerate experimentation, reduce engineering overhead, and improve research velocity.
Explore how sovereign AI clouds help institutions retain full control over sensitive data, models, and intellectual property.
Discover how scalable, national‐grade AI infrastructure empowers universities to compete globally and produce frontier‐level scientific breakthroughs.

title: Your Agent is Expensive and Wrong (Let's Fix Both!) (Presented by Databricks)
abstract: More than 80% of AI projects fail. The reason? Customers are not ready to put AI in production in areas where the agent can cause reputational or financial harm. Agent Bricks solves this by automatically generating domain‐specific synthetic data and task‐aware benchmarks, then using those benchmarks to auto‐optimize the agents for accuracy, latency and expense-eliminating the tedious trial‐and‐error cycle. In this session, you'll see how to design and scale multi‐agent systems that combine retrieval, reasoning, and generation to answer complex, enterprise‐grounded queries, while tracking experiments, fine‐tuning models, and building governed, repeatable workflows that can be deployed at scale. By the end you'll be equipped to launch production‐ready AI agents with confidence, speed, and budget‐control from Day 1.
topic: Agentic AI / Generative AI - Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
key_takeaways: Learn the primary challenges for building and deploying AI agents of high quality.
Design and scale multi‐agent systems that combine retrieval, reasoning, and generation to answer complex, enterprise‐grounded queries.
Launch production‐ready AI agents with confidence, speed, and budget‐control from Day 1.

title: Transform Clinical and Commercial Workflows with AI Agents That Deliver Immediate Impact
abstract: Explore how a unified agentic AI platform, optimized for life sciences, can automate complex clinical and commercial workflows to accelerate research, improve patient outcomes, and drive sustainable growth. With organizations moving quickly toward an "agent-first" operating model, now is the moment to understand where automation can deliver immediate, transformational impact.
topic: Agentic AI / Generative AI - Biology - Generative AI
nvidia_technology: Cloud / Data Center GPU, NeMo, NVIDIA NIM, Nemotron
key_takeaways: See how agentic AI, purpose built for life sciences, automates complex clinical and commercial workflows to accelerate research, improve data quality, and reduce manual burden.
Understand why organizations are moving to an "agent-first" operating model, and the immediate operational, financial, and competitive gains it creates.
Identify high-value workflows in your organization that can be automated today for rapid, measurable impact on performance and outcomes.
Learn the essential steps to adopt and scale agentic AI safely and effectively, from data readiness and governance to enterprise deployment.
Understand how to ensure the appropriate validation and evaluation of AI to ensure alignment with business objectives, as well as with regulatory guardrails.

title: Network Automation Lessons Learned From Launching 20+ Multi-Tenant Clouds and AI Factories (Presented by Netris)
abstract: Both enterprises and NVIDIA Cloud Partners (NCPs) must establish consistent tenant isolation across NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet, NVIDIA Quantum InfiniBand, NVLink Multi-Node, DPU, virtual, and edge networks. This requires hard isolation across bare metal, virtual machines (VMs), and container workloads on all involved fabrics to support data sovereignty and compliance requirements.
nvidia_technology: BlueField DPU, Infiniband Networking, Ethernet Networking, NVLink / NVSwitch
key_takeaways: Operational Lessons Learned from Launching 20-plus Multi-Tenant NCPs and AI Factories: Gain real-world insights from launching 20+ NCP clusters over the last year, including architectural challenges, scaling considerations, and operational trade-offs encountered when deploying shared GPU-based AI clusters.

How to Deliver Dynamic and Secure Multi-Tenancy using Hardware-Level Isolation: The session will cover how true multi-tenancy is enabled through hardware-level isolation across bare metal, VM, and container workloads. This hard isolation-now the industry standard for data sovereignty and compliance-is applied on switches, DPUs, and fabrics by defining endpoints, with Netris algorithms automatically generating and applying the correct configurations across all network elements.

Why Network Automation is Critical for Deploying and Operating Shared GPU-based AI Clusters: The session will explain why network automation is required to deploy, onboard tenants, and operate shared GPU-based AI clusters where isolation, consistency, and ongoing change are critical.

title: Building Dawn: An AI Agent for Mental Health With Clinically-Grounded Safety
abstract: We'll share how we built Dawn, an AI agent for mental health support, addressing the unique challenges of deploying LLMs in clinical settings. Learn how we developed clinically-grounded evaluation frameworks and specialized guardrails through close collaboration with Ph.D.-level psychologists, moving beyond generic safety measures to systems designed specifically for therapeutic conversations.
topic: Agentic AI / Generative AI - Text Generation
key_takeaways: Discover why standard LLM benchmarks fail for mental health.
Learn why generic AI guardrails are insufficient for mental health applications.
Explore how clinical co-design throughout the development life cycle produces safer, more effective AI systems.
Understand the post-training techniques required to align general-purpose LLMs toward mental health outcomes.
Gain practical insights from deploying AI mental health support at scale.

title: Why AI Requires Vertically Integrated, AI-Native Cloud Infrastructure (Presented by Lightning AI)
abstract: AI workloads aren't web applications, and they're pushing traditional hyperscaler clouds beyond the assumptions they were built on. Learn why full-stack, AI-native cloud delivers measurable gains in performance, cost, and iteration speed.
key_takeaways: Examine why a fragmented AI stack increasingly limits both technical and business outcomes.
Understand why tightly coupling software with GPUs changes performance and cost curves.
Define what "AI-native" actually means in practice.
Explore why the current AI stack is fractured.
Identify the ways unified platforms accelerate iteration speed.

title: Opentrons: Close the Gap Between Intent and Execution in the Lab
abstract: AI is rapidly reshaping laboratory automation, moving beyond static scripting toward systems that can reason, perceive, and act in the physical world. In this session, James Atwood (Opentrons) explores what's next for AI-enabled labs as large language models, computer vision, and robotics converge. He'll examine how LLMs are evolving from tools that translate scientific intent into executable workflows into components of adaptive systems that plan experiments, interact with robotic platforms, and respond to changing requirements. He'll also highlight the growing role of vision-based and multi-modal models for verification, real-time monitoring, and in-run adjustment. Looking ahead, James introduces emerging vision-language-action approaches that unify planning, perception, and execution, connecting digital intelligence with physical lab automation.
key_takeaways: Explore how to design and run adaptive automated workflows using AI systems that plan experiments, translate intent into action, and evolve as methods and requirements change.
Learn how to apply vision and multi-modal AI for real-time execution control, enabling verification, monitoring, and in-run adjustments directly on automated lab platforms.
Dive into emerging vision-language-action approaches that connect planning, perception, and execution to create more autonomous, resilient laboratory automation systems.

title: NVIDIA Inception Presents: Startup Pitches
abstract: Join us for an engaging hour of startup pitches showcasing groundbreaking solutions across diverse fields, including AI for science, telco, quantum, agentic AI, and more. These dynamic presentations are part of NVIDIA Inception, a free program designed to help startups evolve faster through cutting-edge technology, opportunities to connect with venture capitalists, and access to the latest technical resources from NVIDIA.
key_takeaways: Innovative Insights: Discover cutting-edge solutions addressing real-world challenges across industries.
Emerging Trends: Gain a front-row seat to the latest developments in AI and accelerated computing technologies.
Networking Opportunities: Connect with startups, industry experts, and potential collaborators in an innovation-focused environment.
Investment Potential: Identify high-impact startups with scalable solutions for potential funding or partnerships.
Inspiration and Ideas: Learn how startups are leveraging advanced tools and frameworks to drive growth and transformation.

title: When Surgical Intelligence Becomes Embodied: The Agentic Operating Room and the Partners Behind It
abstract:
AI in healthcare is moving beyond perception and prediction toward real-time action in the physical world. Nowhere is this shift more demanding than the operating room, where conditions change continuously and coordination across systems is critical.

This session introduces the agentic operating room-a physical AI architecture where distributed agents across imaging, robotics, sensors, and clinical applications run locally, reason independently, and synchronize through shared context and orchestration. See how NVIDIA's physical AI stack and partner network enables this workflow, from simulation and digital twins to accelerated training and low-latency edge inference.

Join Pertias.ai to explore how physical AI is turning the operating room into a coordinated, software-defined system-unlocking safer, more adaptive, and more autonomous surgical workflows.
key_takeaways: AI in surgical environments is progressing from perception and prediction to real-time, closed-loop action.
The agentic operating room is defined by distributed, locally executing intelligence.
Realizing this model depends on deep integration across the physical AI partner ecosystem.

title: 从视觉还原到物理交互: 物理可驱动3D 资产生成技术 Beyond Visuals: A Physics-Informed Generative Method for Articulated 3D Assets
abstract:
本演讲将介绍一种将多模态输入转化为物理可驱动资产的生成式方法。我们将详细阐述如何利用 3D 大模型,从输入图像或自然语言,得到具有完整关节结构的3D资产,涵盖自动化关节估计、部件生成以及物理属性推断等技术。
This session introduces a generative method that transforms multimodal inputs into physically drivable assets. We will detail how we leverage 3D large models to transform images or natural language descriptions into fully articulated assets, featuring automated semantic joint estimation, part-aware mesh generation, and precise physical property inference.
topic: Agentic AI / Generative AI - 3D Model Generation
nvidia_technology: Cloud / Data Center GPU, CUDA, TensorRT, Omniverse, cuBLAS, cuDDN, Triton
key_takeaways: 高保真 OpenUSD / URDF 生成:基于多模态提示词(图像或文本)生成可仿真的资产,自动合成网格、纹理及物理属性,实现即拿即用 High-Fidelity OpenUSD / URDF Generation: Generate simulation-ready assets from multimodal prompts (images or text), automatically synthesizing meshes, textures, and physical properties for immediate utility

语义关节估计与分割:利用 3D 大模型进行语义结构分析,实现精确的部件级分割与运动学关节的自动识别 Semantic Joint Estimation & Segmentation: Leverage 3D large models for semantic structural analysis to enable precise part-level segmentation and automatic identification of kinematic joints

生成式网格补全:利用 3D 大模型的生成先验知识,直接推断缺失的几何结构并合成优化后的拓扑,确保模型结构的完整性 Generative Mesh Completion: Utilize the generative priors of 3D large models to directly infer missing geometry and synthesize optimized topology, ensuring model integrity

title: 利用 NVIDIA Dynamo Router 的 LongCat-Flash 高效推理案例研究:面向智能体时代的模型-系统协同设计
abstract:
聚焦 LongCat-Flash 560B MoE 模型的系统级协同设计实践,展示如何实现面向 Agent 场景的极低延时与高性价比推理。在多层次并行调度与动态算子融合的支撑下,LongCat-Flash 在单用户 100 TPS 的高并发场景中,以每百万输出 token 仅 0.7 美元 的成本,达成吞吐与成本的最优平衡。
该架构通过结构相关的算子编排策略,充分调度 NVLink 高速互联、NIC 网络接口卡、GPU 计算单元及内存带宽 等异构资源,构建高吞吐、低延时的推理系统。依托 NVIDIA Dynamo router 等关键组件,系统在生产环境中实现高可用性与动态容错能力,稳态维持推理服务的 SLA 一致性,为智能体时代的大规模推理服务提供可落地的通用范式。
topic: Agentic AI / Generative AI - Text Generation
nvidia_technology: CUDA, TensorRT, Infiniband Networking, Hopper, cuBLAS, NCCL, NSight Compute, NSight Systems, NVLink / NVSwitch, Blackwell, Dynamo
key_takeaways: 本文以 LongCat-Flash 为案例,深入探讨如何实现模型吞吐与推理效率的协同平衡--在 560B 亿参数的 MoE 模型上,以每百万输出 token 0.7 美元的成本达成 100 TPS 的单用户处理时延
我们的目标是构建高效推理系统,通过结构相关的算子编排策略,实现 NVLink 高速互联、网络接口卡(NIC)、计算单元与内存带宽等异构硬件资源的高效运转,在降低延时的情况下提升系统整体吞吐
借助 Dynamo 等技术栈,在生产环境的严苛要求下实现系统高可用性,并通过实时容错机制确保服务 SLA

title: 以 WAM 为核心构建全域 AI 2.0,AI+车技术实践分享
abstract: 汽车行业的发展正迎来一个大变革时代,处在从"功能叠加"迈向"体验融合"的关键节点,这其中的核心是"AI+车";我们将分享吉利是如何探索,将 AI 融入智能汽车的架构、动力、底盘、座舱、辅助驾驶以及生产制造、企业发展等全链路,以及我们最新提出全域 AI 2.0 技术架构和WAM模型的实践应用。
key_takeaways: 智能汽车的发展趋势是什么,AI+车会如何发展
构建开放的"AI 出行公司"技术生态,在物理 AI, 工业 AI, 以及企业 AI 方面充分借助 NVIDIA 芯片算力和生态优势
以 WAM 模型为核心的吉利全域 AI 2.0,构建一个巨大的端到端系统,实现全域多模态融合与协同
从模型到体验:以 WAM 兑现舱驾一体的全球领先体验

speakers.name: 传海 李
speakers.title: 吉利汽车集团首席技术官

title: Watch Party: 用於即時影像理解的視覺 AI 代理
abstract:
本場 GTC Watch Party 是由 NVIDIA 團隊所主持,將由台灣的技術專家 Eason Hung 以中文講解並導讀國外精選演講,會中可以即時與講師互動、發問,歡迎您一起加入討論。(請注意:由於時區差異,本場講座的原講者可能不會參加。)
新一代視覺 AI 代理以 NVIDIA Blueprint 視訊搜尋和摘要 (video search and summarization,VSS) 為起點,它支援創建互動式分析代理,這些代理能夠處理海量影片、評估物理過程並提供決策洞察,從而簡化操作。該 Blueprint 將強大的視覺語言模型 (vision language model,VLM)、以大型語言模型為基礎的進階搜尋功能以及 Cosmos Reason VLM 整合到一套完整的軟體中。我們簡化了在邊緣端、本地端或雲端進行客製化和部署的過程。搶先了解 VSS 的新功能,加速您的 AI 代理開發。
在演講開始前 15 分鐘,下方將出現「Join Watch Party Now」連結。請點擊該連結,並在電腦應用程式或網頁瀏覽器開啟 Microsoft Teams 以線上加入。
topic: Computer Vision / Video Analytics - Video Analytics

speakers.name: Adam Ryason
speakers.title: Product Manager, NVIDIA AI Blueprint for Video Search and Summarization (VSS)

title: 基于 NVIDIA Jetson Thor 的机器人视觉解决方案
abstract: 本演讲课程主要围绕 NVIDIA Jetson Thor 为核心,重点分享基于 Jetson Thor 的机器人视觉解决方案。并分析和讨论行业主流功能应用,并深入讨论全新的机器人视觉解决方案,行业应用和未来展望。
key_takeaways: 机器人视觉的主流功能与应用
核心功能的技术原理
NVIDIA Jetson Thor 及 HSB 赋能的新机器人视觉解决方案
典型应用场景及未来展望

speakers.name: Bin Li
speakers.title: 首席市场生态官(CMO)
speakers.company: 深圳市森云智能科技有限公司

title: 智能融合:下一代端到端架构演进
abstract: 当前自动驾驶方案已经从两段式演进到了一段式端到端方案,如何更进一步激活智能提升自动驾驶能力,如何拥抱大模型带来的行业变革,真正让自动驾驶能力超越 L2 还欠缺哪些关键要素,本次分享提供一些思路以供抛砖引玉。
key_takeaways: 端到端架构发展
仿真能力在系统中扮演的重要角色
引入 VLA 模型,提供更多维度决策量与认知能力,提升系统极限

speakers.name: 沐 杨
speakers.title: CTO
speakers.company: 重庆千里智驾科技有限公司

title: 基于 Megatron-Core 的动态自适应并行训练方案
abstract: 本讲座将介绍基于 Megatron-Core 的动态自适应并行训练方案,该方案通过运行时自适应技术解决长尾序列训练中计算与内存的严重失配问题。其直接应对当前大规模视频模型训练中极端样本带来的效率瓶颈,已在数千 GPU 集群上验证能显著提升训练速度与资源利用率,是推动下一代多模态基础模型高效训练的关键技术。
topic: Agentic AI / Generative AI - Video Generation
key_takeaways: Transformer 架构的模型训练中,计算量与序列长度平方成正比,内存仅与长度线性相关。少量极端长样本会急剧放大二者差距,引发并行气泡与高通信开销。以上下文并行为例:长样本需高并行度,短样本则因此承受低计算强度与额外通信负担,静态方案难以兼顾
本 talk 介绍基于计算强度与内存占用的自适应动态训练方案,支持运行时调整并行维度、微批次数量及重计算/卸载级别,实现异构序列的均衡高效训练
方案严格保持全局批次分布不变,避免分桶、填充等带来的效果损失。经数千块NVIDIA GPU 集群验证,在工业级视频生成模型训练中端到端性能提升达 60%。核心特性已被 Megatron-Core 团队采纳并集成

title: Watch Party: 創新引擎:加速運算如何重塑全球產業
abstract: 本場 GTC Watch Party 是由 NVIDIA 團隊所主持,將由台灣的技術專家 Mason Wu 以中文講解並導讀國外精選演講,會中可以即時與講師互動、發問,歡迎您一起加入討論。(請注意:由於時區差異,本場講座的原講者可能不會參加。)深入分析 NVIDIA 創辦人暨執行長黃仁勳在其主題演講中的關鍵公告,重點在於賦能技術、預期影響以及各行業的機會。在演講開始前 15 分鐘,下方將出現「Join Watch Party Now」連結。請點擊該連結,並在電腦應用程式或網頁瀏覽器開啟 Microsoft Teams 以線上加入。
nvidia_technology: HGX, CUDA, RAPIDS, cuQuantum, CUDA-X, cuDDN, cuDF, cuFFT, cuGraph, cuLitho, cuML, cuOPT, nvCOMP, CUDA Quantum, Blackwell, cuVS, CUDA-Q

title: 端到端用于自动驾驶的强化认知(Reinforced Cognitive)框架
abstract: 在小米汽车(Xiaomi EV),我们提出了一套全新的强化认知(Reinforced Cognitive)端到端自动驾驶框架:以"理解-预测-决策"一体化为目标,将世界模型(World Model)与强化学习(Reinforcement Learning, RL)深度融合,在同一端到端网络中同时完成驾驶环境理解与轨迹/动作规划,从而在多样化真实道路场景中显著提升行驶安全性与舒适性。具体而言,该框架以多模态感知输入(环视图像/BEV 特征、车身状态、导航意图与车道拓扑等)为统一上下文,先由"认知表征"模块形成可用于决策的紧凑隐空间;随后引入可学习的世界模型在数字空间内进行多主体交互与时序演化建模,输出未来占用/可行驶区域、关键交通参与者的多模态意图分布、风险与不确定性,并支持"想象式滚动(imagination rollout)"在若干步预测内生成可解释的候选未来;在此基础上,策略/价值网络通过强化学习进行闭环优化,以"安全-合规-效率-舒适"为核心奖励体系,结合离线RL与安全约束 RL/风险敏感 RL 实现稳定可控的策略改进;最终帮助模型不仅"会开",还能"知道为什么这么开、哪里风险更高",在复杂场景中获得更平顺、更安心且更可靠的驾驶行为。
nvidia_technology: DRIVE, DGX Platform, CUDA, TensorRT, cuBLAS, cuDDN, cuML
key_takeaways: Long-tailed scenario generation by world model
Auto-regressive modeling with reinforcement learning
Fast post-training with specific-designed AI infrastructure

title: 基于全局 KV Cache 存储系统的高效 LLM 推理加速方案 Efficient LLM Inference Acceleration via a Global KV Cache Storage System
abstract:
KV Cache 通过"以存储换计算"的方式显著提升了大语言模型(LLM)的推理效率。然而,受限于高带宽内存(HBM)容量有限且成本高昂,将 KV Cache 扩展至外部高性能存储系统已成为关键优化方向。
本次 Session 聚焦我们与 NVIDIA 联合开展的系统级协同优化工作,在满足服务等级目标(SLO)的前提下,针对 LLM 推理中动态变化的工作负载,提出一套端到端的全局 KV Cache 解决方案。该方案涵盖:推理引擎与远程存储的深度集成优化,全局 KV Cache 元数据的统一管理与配置策略,面向 KV Cache 访问模式定制的远程存储架构设计。在典型 LLM 推理场景中,该方案实现了显著性能与成本收益:Cache 命中率提升 39%,P99 延迟降低 78%,单位 token 的计算与存储综合成本降至原来的 24%(即降低 76%)。
key_takeaways: 经济性建模与权衡分析:我们构建了 KV Cache 存储成本与推理计算开销的联合帕累托模型,可精准评估不同配置下在延迟、吞吐和总拥有成本 Cost-Efficiency Modeling: We develop a Pareto-aware economic model that jointly evaluates KV cache storage cost and inference compute, enabling accurate trade-off analysis across latency, throughput, and total cost of ownership.(TCO)之间的平衡点,为系统设计提供量化依据。

标准化元数据管理与仿真平台:在全局 KV Cache 池化管理成为行业共识的基础上,我们提出一个存储无关的标准化元数据管理组件,支持异构存储层级(如 DRAM、SSD、远程内存等)。配合高保真 KV Cache 模拟器,可自动评估各类配置的经济效益,并推荐最优部署策略 Unified Metadata & Simulation Framework: We propose a standardized, storage-agnostic KV cache metadata manager that supports heterogeneous storage tiers. Coupled with a high-fidelity KV cache simulator, it enables automated configuration selection for optimal cost-performance outcomes.

面向下一代注意力机制的演进支持:随着模型架构从 Full Attention 向 Hybrid Attention(如 Linear Attention、Sparse Attention)演进,KV Cache 的管理复杂度显著提升。我们在推理引擎内部实现了对 Hybrid Attention / Cache / Memory 的协同优化,并通过可扩展的元数据管理框架,为未来注意力机制的持续演进提供底层支持 Future-Proofing for Advanced Attention Mechanisms: As models evolve from full attention to hybrid architectures (e.g., linear or sparse attention), KV cache management must co-evolve. We demonstrate how our inference engine and metadata layer are designed to support emerging attention patterns-enabling seamless integration of Hybrid Attention, dynamic cache strategies, and memory-aware scheduling.

title: 端到端模型部署:从 L2 到 L4 - Thor 如何加速 L4 技术栈与 Robotaxi 规模化落地
abstract: 本场分享将探讨文远知行(WeRide)如何结合 NVIDIA DRIVE Thor 与通用仿真平台 WeRide GENESIS,加速端到端(E2E)模型从 L2 到 L4 的部署与迭代,并推动城市 Robotaxi 的规模化落地。通过"数据中心训练 + Thor 车端推理"的云到车全栈架构,文远知行提升了 AI 模型的跨域泛化能力与实时推理效率;同时借助 GENESIS 的 Smart Agent、视频生成(Video Generation)、风格迁移(Style Transfer) 等能力,快速生成多视角、多世界变化的传感器数据与高价值长尾场景,用于训练与评测,使端到端闭环迭代显著提速,支撑 Robotaxi 的量产与稳定运营。
topic: Developer Tools & Techniques - Vision Language Models (VLMs)
key_takeaways: 文远知行构建"云端训练 + Thor 车端推理"的协同架构,形成贯通云到车的全栈自动驾驶系统,提升端到端模型的跨域泛化与落地效率
通过集成双 Thor 芯片,文远知行推出 HPC 3.0 高性能平台,增强 L4 级端到端推理效率与任务并行能力,满足城市 Robotaxi 的规模化部署与实时运营需求
NVIDIA DRIVE Thor 针对生成式 AI、视觉语言模型(VLM)与大语言模型(LLM)进行了架构级优化,支持基于生成式 AI 与多模态 VLM 的智能交互体验
WeRide GENESIS 面向端到端模型仿真需求,可生成可控的传感器数据(如视角变化、环境变化),并通过 Smart Agent、视频生成与风格迁移,构建更丰富的训练与验证数据
GENESIS 可高效生成真实道路难以复现的角落场景与危险场景,用于训练与评测,速度更快、成本更低、覆盖更广,最终显著缩短端到端迭代周期

title: 基于扩散模型的具身智能:从统一理论到 GPU 加速的机器人策略 Diffusion-Driven Embodied AI: From Unified Theory to GPU-Accelerated Robot Policies
abstract:
本报告将系统阐述基于可控扩散模型的新一代机器人学习框架。首先,我们提出一种用于全新的可控扩散模型的统一理论框架,揭示其如何为机器人决策提供一种兼具表达力与可控性的数学新范式。随后,将展示一种突破性的、原生运行于 GPU 的 on-policy 扩散强化学习算法,在效率上树立新的标杆。最后,我们将通过真实的机器人实验展示其在精细操作与运动控制等核心任务上达到的业界领先性能。
This session will systematically elaborate on a new generation robot learning framework based on controllable diffusion models. First, we propose a unified theoretical framework for a novel controllable diffusion model, revealing how it provides a new mathematical paradigm for robot decision-making that combines expressiveness and controllability. Subsequently, a groundbreaking on-policy diffusion-based reinforcement learning algorithm, natively running on GPUs, will be presented, setting a new benchmark in efficiency. Finally, we will demonstrate its industry-leading performance in core tasks such as dexterous manipulation and motion control through real-world robot experiments.
key_takeaways: 理论基础:提出了一个用于可控扩散模型的新理论框架,为机器人决策建立了兼具表达力与可控性的数学新范式 Unified Theoretical Framework: A novel theoretical framework for controllable diffusion models is introduced, establishing a new expressive and controllable mathematical paradigm for robot decision-making.

强化学习突破:提出新一代扩散强化学习范式,通过大规模 GPU 并行,在模型探索性上显著超越传统方法 Reinforcement Learning Breakthrough: We introduce a next-generation diffusion reinforcement learning paradigm that dramatically outperforms traditional methods in sample efficiency through massive GPU parallelism.

业界领先的机器人性能:真实的机器人实验验证了该框架在精细操作与运动控制等核心任务上达到了业界领先的性能水平 Leading Robot Performance Real-world experiments validate the framework's state-of-the-art performance in critical robotic tasks like dexterous manipulation and motion control.
如何在 Isaac Lab 基准测试中使用 Nsight 工具进行性能分析 How to use Nsight profiling in Isaac Lab benchmarks.

title: 基于多模态数据湖的新一代人工智能应用:NVIDIA 工具链落地实践的深度洞察
abstract: 多模态数据湖已成为新一代人工智能开发的核心基石,能够助力企业高效处理各类数据类型,为生成式人工智能流水线提供数据支撑。本次分享将深入讲解构建可扩展、GPU 加速型多模态数据湖的实操策略 -- 重点聚焦性能提升与工作流的无缝集成两大核心。我们将探讨 NVIDIA 工具链(包括 Nemo Curator、PyNvVideoCodec、CVCUDA)如何简化企业级数据处理与数据治理流程,同时解析 GPU 解决方案如何与基于 Ray Data 和 Daft 的工作流协同融合,降低从 CPU 到 GPU 的迁移难度。此外,我们还将分享真实的行业落地案例,拆解自动驾驶、机器人、AI 生成视频(AIGV) / VLM等不同业务场景的个性化需求,并重点解读面向定制化流水线设计的消融实验结果。
key_takeaways: 架构设计优化:掌握构建可扩展、GPU 加速型多模态数据湖的最佳实践,打造可支撑生成式 AI 流水线的架构体系,将数据处理吞吐量提升数倍至数十倍
NVIDIA 工具链及集成方案:深入了解 Nemo Curator、PyNvVideoCodec、CVCUDA 三款工具如何优化企业级 AI 数据工作流 -- 依托 Ray 分布式扩展能力实现弹性扩容,可无缝集成至 Ray Data/Daft 生态体系,无需改变企业现有数据工程的使用习惯
行业定制化应用:从多模态数据处理的实际落地案例中提炼实战经验,同时掌握自动驾驶、机器人、AI 生成视频 / 视觉语言模型等业务场景的客户案例与最佳实践

title: AIBOX + AIOS:构建生成式 AI 在智能汽车的端侧落地新范式
abstract:
随着生成式 AI 的爆发,汽车正成为继手机之后的下一个核心载体。然而,当前车载系统仍面临端侧算力不足、架构碎片化、高延迟及隐私安全等严峻挑战。
本次演讲将深度解析 AIBox + AIOS 的全栈技术方案。该方案在不破坏既有座舱架构的前提下,通过即插即用的 AI 硬件底座与 AI 原生操作系统,结合 TS-EdgeLLM-Server 推理架构,实现了多模态模型(如 Qwen2.5-VL)的端侧高效部署。通过端云协同与多智能体(Multi-Agent)协作,我们将分享如何优化量化算法与 Eagle3 调优经验,将车辆从"被动响应"升级为"主动感知"的智能体,助力 OEM 构建低延迟、高可靠且可持续演进的车内 AI 体验。
topic: Agentic AI / Generative AI - Code / Software Generation
key_takeaways: 全栈架构: 解析 AIBox + AIOS 路径,实现生成式 AI 在车端的可工程化与量产落地
高效推理: 详解 TS-EdgeLLM-Server 架构,攻克端侧延迟、成本与隐私三大痛点
实战优化: 分享 Qwen2.5-VL 多模态模型适配、量化及 Eagle3 调优的工程实践
主动交互: 探讨多智能体(Multi-Agent)协作机制,驱动车辆从被动响应转向主动服务
商业价值: 赋能 OEM 在不改变既有座舱架构的前提下,快速构建可持续演进的 AI 体验

title: From Data to Meaning: Vision-Language Models Shaping the Cities of Tomorrow
abstract:
In this session, we'll explore how K2K is applying data-compliant Vision-Language Models (VLMs) integrated with NVIDIA Cosmos Reason and Metropolis Blueprint for Video Search and Summarization (VSS) to turn passive footage into proactive decision-making.
We'll walk through how VLM-driven understanding enables cities to automate operational processes, anticipate incidents, and optimize resource allocation through granular semantic insight rather than traditional detection alone. We'll also share how generated data, synthetic data and simulation pipelines are being used to scale robust urban AI without exposing personal identity data.
The result: AI agents that don't just "see," but interpret, reason, and support real-time city operations in a trustworthy way.
topic: Computer Vision / Video Analytics - Video Analytics
nvidia_technology: DeepStream, Metropolis, TAO Toolkit, NVIDIA NIM, Cosmos, Blueprint
key_takeaways: Why data-compliant VLMs unlock new business models for cities.
Quantifiable ROI from city-scale semantic video understanding
What real real-time vision AI agents can already solve today

title: Model Builders at the Frontier of EMEA's Open and Sovereign AI Movement
abstract: Europe's drive toward sovereign AI is redefining the way open, transparent, and multilingual large models are built at scale. This panel explores the technical foundations that drive this effort. Speakers will discuss best practices in data quality, domain adaptation, and culturally aligned evaluation for low-resource languages, showing how sovereign and open models can meet European requirements while delivering state-of-the-art performance. The discussion will also highlight how NVIDIA Nemotron enables European, Middle Eastern, and African (EMEA) developers to build and fine-tune competitive large models, accelerating innovation while reducing dependence on proprietary platforms. In addition, the panel will touch on how European developers and companies are preparing these models for real-world inference and deployment across diverse applications.
topic: Developer Tools & Techniques - Pre-Trained / Foundation Models
key_takeaways: Discover how EMEA-based companies are shaping the next generation of open and sovereign AI models-and what this means for developers and innovators working across diverse languages and domains.
Explore the data, design, and deployment principles driving multilingual model excellence in real-world contexts.
Learn how open model ecosystems and new tools like NVIDIA Nemotron are empowering builders to advance large‐scale, culturally aligned AI innovation.

title: PAI 集成 NVIDIA Physical AI:驱动数据合成、模型训练测评一体化 PAI Integrates NVIDIA Physical AI: Power E2E SDG, Model Training & Evaluation
abstract: 自 2025 年,人工智能平台 PAI 融合 NVIDIA Physical AI 领域的多项技术,服务中国及全球的具身智能、自动驾驶及 AGI 大模型团队。此分享将详细介绍 PAI 的 AI 云服务能力和 NVIDIA Physical AI 如何紧密协同,依托 PAI 的高性能计算资源、分布式计算服务以及开箱即用的开发平台,解决数据合成、模型训练、模型测评的实际问题。 同时还将隆重推出 2026 年 PAI & NVIDIA Physical AI 带来的最新升级能力。Since 2025, PAI (Platform for AI) has integrated advanced NVIDIA Physical AI technologies to empower Embodied AI, Autonomous Driving, and AGI teams worldwide. This session provides a technical deep-dive into the seamless synergy between PAI's cloud-native AI infrastructure and NVIDIA Physical AI, strategically leveraging PAI's advantages in high-performance computing resource, distributed computing service, and easy-to-use development platform to resolve critical bottlenecks in Synthetic Data Generation (SDG), model training, and performance benchmarking. Furthermore, we will unveil the 2026 roadmap and the latest full-stack feature upgrades.
key_takeaways: PAI 平台的核心能力,以及如何帮助深度学习以及 Agentic AI 团队高效使用海量云端算力 Core capabilities of PAI, and how it facilitates Deep Learning and Agentic AI teams in orchestrating massive cloud-scale compute resources with high efficiency.

Physical AI 领域的新挑战,PAI & NVIDIA Physical AI 产品集成路线图,以及最新升级能力的发布 Emerging challenges in Physical AI, the product roadmap of PAI & NVIDIA Physical AI integration, and the release of next-generation features.

中国及全球的具身智能、自动驾驶及 AGI 大模型团队如何使用 PAI 与 NVIDIA Physical AI 技术解决实际问题 How Embodied AI, Autonomous Driving, and AGI teams worldwide leverage PAI and NVIDIA Physical AI stacks to resolve real-world deployment challenges.
探讨对 Physical AI 的发展趋势的观察,以及对如何实现 AGI 的潜在影响 Observations on the evolution of Physical AI and its potential impact on the architectural path toward achieving AGI.

title: NVIDIA 加速辅助驾驶 2.0 时代 AI 定义汽车的大规模应用
abstract: 本次演讲将介绍 NVIDIA 的辅助驾驶核心模块,从云端训练到车端推理的全栈解决方案,包括 NVIDIA Cosmos Reason(视频理解和 VLA 骨干网络)、Cosmos World Model(全局场景仿真)、 NuRec 神经重建和闭环仿真、ACCV-Lab 辅助驾驶训练工具包以及面向 NVIDIA DRIVE Thor 的 VLA 模型部署及展望
